headline: A Look At Prudential Financial’s Valuation After Wells Fargo Downgrade And Target Cuts
summary: Prudential Financial (PRU) has come under pressure after Wells Fargo cut its rating from Equal-Weight to Underweight, and several other firms reduced their stock price expectations, even as the broader consensus still sits at Hold. See our latest analysis for Prudential Financial. At a share price of US$99.95, Prudential Financial has had a 1-month share price return of 10.04% decline and a year to date share price return of 12.22% decline, while its 5-year total shareholder return of 37.11%...

headline: Wells Fargo Credit Risk Questioned After UK Mortgage Lender Collapse
summary: Market Financial Solutions Ltd., a UK mortgage firm, has collapsed, drawing attention to credit links across lenders. Investors are focusing on Wells Fargo (NYSE:WFC) and any exposure it may have to loans or facilities tied to the failed lender. The event is prompting fresh questions about risk controls and credit quality in bank lending portfolios. Wells Fargo, one of the largest US banks by assets, is a key provider of mortgages, commercial loans and capital markets services. When a...

headline: Wells Fargo Trims Equitable Holdings (EQH) to $57
summary: Equitable Holdings Inc. (NYSE:EQH) is one of the 14 Most Undervalued NYSE Stocks to Buy According to Analysts.
